name: catalog-enrichment-skill
description: Auto-enrich product catalogs by detecting missing attributes, generating standardized descriptions, inferring categories and tags, and scoring completeness.
author: alphaparkinc

products.description: Product records: [{id, name, description, price, category, tags, images}].

required_fields.description: Fields that must be present for a complete record.

enriched_products.description: Products with filled gaps, inferred tags, and completeness scores.

catalog_health.description: Overall catalog completeness and quality metrics.
